prompt:
Use case: precise-object-edit
Asset type: production source for a layered 2D side-view Unity shipwreck arrival
Primary request: Transform this exact small single-mast clinker-built sailboat into the same boat immediately after an offshore wreck. Preserve the strict side view, salt-gray plank bands, dark corroded straps, off-white torn sail, right stern rudder, scale and material identity. Break the hull around the mast step: keep a coherent half-submerged stern section, a separated bow section with a narrow jagged gap and exposed inner ribs, a snapped leaning mast, slack rigging and a collapsed torn sail still attached to the spar.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform #ff00ff chroma-key background.
Constraints: no ocean, foam, splash, person, text, UI, glow, shadow, rectangular base, generic debris pile, modern material, colorful repair patch, second boat or changed camera.
